prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The statutory biodiversity metric and related tools primarily apply to England, as they are part of the planning and environmental management system specific to English legislation. Scotland has its own distinct biodiversity strategies and metrics established under separate legal frameworks.
